mvpStep: Generate DOCX legal documents in minutes.

q1.question: What is included in the Basic plan?
q1.answer: Basic includes core features for small teams.

q2.question: Can I switch plans later?
q2.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time.

q3.question: Do you offer refunds?
q3.answer: We offer refunds within 14 days of purchase.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to generate professional legal documents

steps.title: Upload DOCX Template
steps.text: Extract template placeholders from your existing legal documents.

steps.title: Upload CSV/XLSX Data
steps.text: Preview rows and headers from your data files to ensure correctness.

steps.title: Map Fields & Generate
steps.text: Generate single DOCX documents or batch ZIP files ready for use.

items.title: Multiple File Formats
items.text: Compatible with Word, Excel, and CSV.

items.title: Mapping Import/Export
items.text: Save and reuse JSON mappings for future projects.

items.title: Download Options
items.text: Single DOCX or batch ZIP files.

dataQuality.noData: Upload data to see quality metrics.

ai.noResult: Run AI to see the response here.

errors.missingData: Please upload data before requesting a summary.
errors.missingTemplate: Please upload a template before requesting advice.
errors.apiNotConfigured: AI API is not configured for this environment.

notes.dataHint: The first row must contain headers.
notes.mappingHint: Map each template field to a data column.
notes.generationHint: Select a row for single generation or process all rows.
notes.dataQualityHint: Quick checks for completeness and duplicates.
notes.mappingHealthHint: Track how many template fields are mapped.
notes.aiHint: Get quick insights and mapping advice from AI.
notes.registerHint: Make sure your password is at least 8 characters long.
notes.loginHint: Enter your credentials to access your account.

mapping.notReady: Upload a template and data file to map fields.
mapping.importFailed: Failed to import the mapping file.
mapping.importNoMatches: Imported mapping has no matching columns.

errors.incompleteMapping: Complete the field mapping before generation.
errors.batchFailed: Batch completed with errors in rows: {{rows}}

errors.noPlaceholders: No placeholders were detected in the template.
errors.dataParseFailed: Failed to read the data file.
errors.noColumns: No columns were detected in the data file.

status.intro: Upload a DOCX template with placeholders and CSV/XLSX data. Map the fields and download filled DOCX (single) or ZIP (batch) in minutes.
